item.description:
Release v4.4.0

Changes since v4.3.0

  • feat: add App Store Connect add-to-chat context menus
  • feat: add App Store Connect agent toolset
  • feat: add AppToolbarContainer and unify toolbar styles
  • feat: add dev context menus for App Store Connect actions
  • feat: add development-focused add-to-chat menu section
  • feat: auto-load versions when VersionsSection appears
  • feat: gate dev context menu by Lumi project marker
  • feat: harden EditorSwift semantic indexing with manifest cache and job control
  • feat: localize check for updates menu item
  • feat: reduce semantic index UI main-thread load
  • fix: adapt screenshot container aspect ratio based on displayType
  • fix: clear stale Xcode toolbar state when switching projects
  • fix: enforce read-only metadata and robust screenshot loading
  • fix: filter screenshot display tabs by selected platform
  • fix: fix missing and untranslated entries in ConversationTitlePlugin Localizable.xcstrings
  • fix: gate AppStoreConnect dev menu by selected project path
  • fix: hide version detail edit actions for released versions
  • fix: prevent stale project UI during project switching
  • fix: remove app icon/name header and platform badge in AppStoreConnect sidebar
  • fix: replace ProgressView with breathing pulse indicator in ConversationTitleHeaderView
